---
title: "Notebook Library"
---

This page collects rendered notebook materials used by the advanced pathway. The Python notebooks are used for the Summer 2026 epidemic modeling project. The R Markdown file is included as a test format for future projects that may use R.

## Summer 2026: Epidemic Modeling

1. [Day 1: Python Foundations for Modeling and Inference](../project_1/materials/Day1.ipynb)
2. [Intro to SIR Models and Euler's Method](example_SIR.ipynb)
3. [Intro to Markov Chains](markov_chains.ipynb)
4. [Intro to MCMC and Inference for State Space Models](MCMC.ipynb)

## Future Project Formats

1. [R Markdown example file](example_R.Rmd)
